scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/rendered-html.test.mjs tests/proxy-redirect.test.mjs
scripts.qa:mvp: npm run embeddings:migration-upgrade && npm run retrieval:migration-upgrade && npm run release:database-rehearsal && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:assistant && npm run test:embeddings && npm run test:retrieval && npm run test:integration && npm run test:documents && npm run test:storage && npm run test:document-integration && npm run test:embedding-integration && npm run test:assistant-integration && npm run test:retrieval-integration && npm run test:artifacts && npm run test:deployment && npm run test:release && npm run test:production-rollout && npm run production:rehearsal && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: eslint . --ignore-pattern dist --ignore-pattern .next --ignore-pattern playwright-report --ignore-pattern review-artifacts --ignore-pattern product-review-evidence --ignore-pattern test-results --ignore-pattern test-logs
scripts.db:reset:test: NODE_ENV=test tsx scripts/db/reset-test.ts && npm run db:seed
scripts.test:phase1-round2-integration: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=fake AI_ASSISTANT_ENABLED=true AI_REGION=cn-beijing AI_PROJECT_ASSISTANT_PROFILE_ID=qwen-project-assistant-cn-v1 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/integration/phase1-requirements-scope.test.ts
scripts.test:phase1-round3-integration: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=fake AI_ASSISTANT_ENABLED=true AI_REGION=cn-beijing AI_PROJECT_ASSISTANT_PROFILE_ID=qwen-project-assistant-cn-v1 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/integration/phase1-work-management.test.ts
scripts.test:storage: npm run test:files && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/integration/project-files.test.ts
scripts.test:assistant: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=fake AI_ASSISTANT_ENABLED=true AI_REGION=cn-beijing AI_PROJECT_ASSISTANT_PROFILE_ID=qwen-project-assistant-cn-v1 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/project-assistant.test.ts

scripts.test:embeddings: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=fake AI_EMBEDDING_ENABLED=true AI_EMBEDDING_PROFILE_ID=qwen-text-embedding-cn-v1 AI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS=1024 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/embeddings.test.ts
scripts.test:retrieval: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=fake AI_ASSISTANT_ENABLED=true AI_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=fake AI_EMBEDDING_ENABLED=true AI_ASSISTANT_RETRIEVAL_MODE=hybrid node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/retrieval.test.ts tests/retrieval-evaluation.test.ts
scripts.retrieval:evaluate: NODE_ENV=test NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=test AI_PROVIDER=fake AI_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=fake tsx scripts/evaluate-retrieval.ts
